sources.title: Ram Jaane 1995 DVDRip X 264 ESubs [ DDR]

metadata.Plot: Ram Jaane is arrested by a security guard after stealing cargo from a train with his best friend. He is shortly released and becomes one of the biggest hustlers in the city. After a deadly shootout, he is arrested by a corrupt police official and sent to jail once again. After a few years of serving in prison, he goes back to the streets and to his friend's place. There he decides to help him raise the local kids in the area so they won't be corrupted by the streets. He quickly falls in love with a childhood girlfriend Bela (Juhi Chawla), but also goes back to his old ways.
metadata.Actors: Shah Rukh Khan, Juhi Chawla, Vivek Mushran
